title: Countryside and Magic（CAM）
description: A comprehensive mod that contains various items and gameplay, featuring country and magic topics.
body:
A comprehensive mod that contains various items and gameplay, featuring country and magic topics.

---

- Items: Over 100 items, including a wide variety of weapons, food, materials and props;
- Village: Three new villager classes have been added, some transaction items and transaction behaviors have been modified, and some other game mechanisms have been introduced.
- Fishing and Exploration: Modified the fishing loot list and the loot lists of some treasure chests.
- Sacrificial gameplay: Added the "Sacrificial Enchantment" for weapons, which can be obtained through the "sacrificial" ceremony.
- Wine-making (not perfect) : A "way of life", it can also serve as a substitute for some of the medicinal liquids in the early stage, allowing one to experience the pleasure and pain of drinking.

---
